users.name: Rahul Sharma
users.bio: Senior Venue Specialist with 8+ years of experience in luxury weddings and corporate events. Expert negotiator who has saved clients an average of 15% on venue costs.

users.name: Priya Singh
users.bio: Wedding planning expert with a passion for creating memorable celebrations. Specializes in destination weddings and intimate ceremonies.

users.name: Amit Kumar
users.bio: Corporate events specialist with connections across 200+ premium venues in Delhi NCR. Known for quick turnarounds and exceptional client service.

users.name: Neha Kapoor
users.bio: Luxury event curator specializing in heritage venues and royal-themed celebrations. Known for impeccable taste and attention to detail.

users.name: Vikram Reddy
users.bio: South India venue specialist with deep connections across Bangalore, Chennai, and Hyderabad. Expert in large-scale corporate and social events.
